usage: setAddRingMode [-help] [-reset] [-avoid_short {true|false}] [-break_core_ring_io_list <io_list>] [-continue_on_no_selection {true|false}] [-detailed_log {true|false}] [-extend_blockring_search_distance <distance>] [-extend_corering_search_distance <distance>] [-extend_merge_with_prewires {true|false}] [-extend_over_row {true|false}] [-extend_search_nets <net_names>] [-extend_stripe_search_distance <distance>] [-gap_width_without_io <value>] [-ignore_rows {true|false}] [-max_via_size {shape width% height% target_penetration%}] [-orthogonal_only {true|false}] [-ring_target {core_ring|default|first_ring|pad_ring|stripe}] [-skip_crossing_trunks {horizontal|vertical|none}] [-skip_via_on_pin {pad|block|cover|standardcell|physicalpin}] [-skip_via_on_wire_shape {blockring|stripe|followpin|corewire|blockwire|iowire|padring|ring|fillwire|noshape}] [-spacing_from_block <value>] [-split_long_via {threshold step offset length}] [-stacked_via_bottom_layer <layerName>] [-stacked_via_top_layer <layerName>] [-via_using_exact_crossover_size {true|false}] [-wire_center_offset {true|false}]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -avoid_short
options.description: Specifies whether to avoid short violation

options.name: -break_core_ring_io_list
options.description: Specifies io instance names for which core ring wires are broken

options.name: -continue_on_no_selection
options.description: Continues w/o selection

options.name: -detailed_log
options.description: Outputs detailed log file addring.log

options.name: -extend_blockring_search_distance
options.description: <distance> Specifies blockring extension search distance

options.name: -extend_corering_search_distance
options.description: <distance> Specifies corering extension search distance

options.name: -extend_merge_with_prewires
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether to merge with prerouted wires

options.name: -extend_over_row
options.description: Specifies whether to extend over row

options.name: -extend_search_nets
options.description: Specifies search net names

options.name: -extend_stripe_search_distance
options.description: <distance> Specifies stripe extension search distance

options.name: -gap_width_without_io
options.description: Specifies the max missing IO Pads area width between IO Pads

options.name: -ignore_rows
options.description: Specifies whether to ignore all rows

options.name: -max_via_size
options.description: {shape width% height% target_penetration%} the maximum size of a crossover via

options.name: -orthogonal_only
options.description: vias connect to orthogonal targets only

options.name: -ring_target
options.description: {core_ring|default|first_ring|pad_ring|stripe} Specifies ring target

options.name: -skip_crossing_trunks
options.description: {horizontal|vertical|none} Specifies whether to skip crossing trunks

options.name: -skip_via_on_pin
options.description: {pad|block|cover|standardcell|physicalpin} prevent vias from being generated on the specified type of pins

options.name: -skip_via_on_wire_shape
options.description: {blockring|stripe|followpin|corewire|blockwire|iowire|padring|ring|fillwire|noshape} prevent vias from being generated on the specified wire shapes

options.name: -spacing_from_block
options.description: Specifies the spacing from block

options.name: -split_long_via
options.description: {threshold step offset length} Split vias longer than <threshold> into smaller vias with specified <step> and bottom/left end <offset> and vertical/horizontal <length>

options.name: -stacked_via_bottom_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -stacked_via_top_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -via_using_exact_crossover_size
options.description: {true|false} generate partial vias of the exact crossover size

options.name: -wire_center_offset
options.description: offset value is from wire center to domain/core boundary
